---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    css: styles/resume.css
    title-block: false
---
<div class="page-header">
<h1>Resume</h1>

<p>
Quality Assurance Engineer with experience in automation, API validation, and release quality across global software projects. Currently pursuing an MBA to bridge technology execution with strategic business leadership.
</p>
</div>

<div class="grid">

<div class="card span-2">
<h2>Professional Summary</h2>

<p>
I am a Quality Assurance Engineer with experience in automation frameworks, API testing, and quality strategy across international projects. My work focuses on improving software reliability, accelerating release cycles, and strengthening development workflows.
</p>

<p>
Alongside my engineering experience, I am currently pursuing an MBA at University Canada West where I study digital transformation, strategic management, and AI in business. My long-term goal is to lead technology teams that align product delivery with measurable business outcomes.
</p>

</div>

## Professional Experience {#experience}

::: {.rail-timeline}

::: {.rail-item}

::: {.rail-date}
Mar 2025 – Present
:::

::: {.rail-rail}
&nbsp;
:::

::: {.rail-body}

### Order Verification Associate  
United Floral Inc — Burnaby, BC

- Ensure high-volume order accuracy within a logistics-driven environment  
- Apply validation and issue detection skills developed through QA work  
- Maintain operational reliability during high demand seasonal operations  

:::
:::

::: {.rail-item}

::: {.rail-date}
Aug 2022 – Sep 2024
:::

::: {.rail-rail}
&nbsp;
:::

::: {.rail-body}

### Quality Assurance Engineer  
Eyepax IT Consulting — Remote (Australia Clients)

- Reduced regression testing time by **50%** through automation frameworks  
- Improved CI/CD stability by integrating automated smoke tests  
- Led weekly issue triage sessions accelerating resolution by **40%**  
- Mentored junior QA engineers to improve automation scripting consistency  

:::
:::

::: {.rail-item}

::: {.rail-date}
Jan 2021 – Aug 2022
:::

::: {.rail-rail}
&nbsp;
:::

::: {.rail-body}

### Software Quality Assurance Engineer  
Intervest Software Technologies — European Insurance Platforms

- Increased test coverage by **80%** across insurance systems  
- Reduced production defects by **45%** through early sprint QA involvement  
- Delivered multiple quarterly releases with **zero critical production defects**  
- Promoted within six months due to performance and adaptability  

:::
:::

::: {.rail-item}

::: {.rail-date}
Jan 2019 – Aug 2020
:::

::: {.rail-rail}
&nbsp;
:::

::: {.rail-body}

### Quality Assurance Intern  
DirectFN Sri Lanka

- Built Selenium-based regression scripts for fintech trading platforms  
- Assisted stability testing for real-time stock market systems  
- Created onboarding documentation later used for QA training  

:::
:::

:::

<div class="card span-2">

<h2>Education</h2>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-top">
<div class="item-title">Master of Business Administration (MBA)</div>
<div class="item-date">Expected 2026</div>
</div>

<div class="item-sub">
University Canada West — Vancouver, Canada  
Focus: Digital Transformation, Strategic Management, AI in Business
</div>

</div>

<div class="item">

<div class="item-top">
<div class="item-title">BSc (Hons) Information Technology</div>
<div class="item-date">Sri Lanka</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="card">

<h2>Certifications</h2>

<ul>
<li>Quality Assurance Automation Tools</li>
<li>Continuous Integration & Testing Practices</li>
</ul>

</div>

<div class="card">

<h2>Key Skills</h2>

<div class="badges">

<span class="badge">Playwright</span>
<span class="badge">Cypress</span>
<span class="badge">Postman</span>
<span class="badge">API Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Regression Strategy</span>
<span class="badge">CI/CD</span>
<span class="badge">Automation Testing</span>
<span class="badge">Performance Testing</span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="card span-2 resume-download">

<h2>Download Resume</h2>

<p>
For a complete overview of my professional experience and academic work, you can download my full resume.
</p>

<a class="resume-btn" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1X5TUtNInDFhAA5ZiSgzv5sLuAvRmQypn/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Download PDF Resume
</a>

</div>

</div>
